prompt: Create a markdown editor with live preview, syntax highlighting, and the ability to export to HTML. Single file, no dependencies.

assertions.text: Writes a detailed specification before sending anything to OpenCode (Phase 1)
The spec mentions a split-pane or side-by-side layout (textarea + preview)
Plans to use gpt-oss-120b on Cerebras for the draft generation
Plans a thorough review phase with specific bug categories to check
Plans a polish phase improving UX beyond the draft quality
